question: What is the main difficulty in drawing precise conclusions from this revenue chart?

options.A: The chart is so small that it is hard to distinguish exact changes between decades.
options.B: Revenue clearly decreased in every decade shown.
options.C: Revenue clearly increased in every decade shown.
options.D: Revenue stayed exactly the same from 1924 to 2024.

explanation: Revenue declined from 1980 to 1990. The extremely small axis labels can make it hard to read which period had the decline.
